content: Address Round 1 Priority 1: Re-frame primary narrative from brain science application to novel computational tool creation
Address Round 1 Priority 2: Strengthen technical differentiation by explicitly naming existing methods (ComBat, normative modeling)
Address Round 1 Priority 3: Substantiate cross-disciplinary impact with concrete algorithm adaptation examples
Address Round 1 Priority 4: Integrate EDI authentically by addressing demographic bias and algorithmic fairness as core technical challenges
Address Round 2 Priority 1: Replace 'Rosetta Stone' metaphor with 'common functional language'
Address Round 2 Priority 2: Hedge performance claims (25% improvement, 90% reduction) with preliminary data language
Address Round 2 Priority 3: Replace marketing language ('Alignment Equity v2.0', 'kill-switch tests') with academic terms
Address Round 2 Priority 4: Reframe cross-disciplinary claims from 'will transform' to 'shows promise for'
Verify word limits are maintained for all sections
Update PROGRESS.md with Round 2 implementation completion
